title: CF_DocCentralV3_SendReminders — Trigger Schema
description: This flow uses a Recurrence (Scheduled) trigger. There are no inputs. The flow generates its own correlationId per run.

recurrenceConfiguration.note: The 08:00 UTC default may need to be adjusted for the client's local timezone. If the client is in Central European Time (UTC+1/+2), consider 06:00 UTC to ensure delivery by 08:00 local time. Confirm with App Config timezone setting (UNKNOWN key).

concurrencyControl.reason: Prevents two simultaneous daily runs from sending the same reminder twice. Must be configured in flow Settings after creation.

generatedPerRun.correlationId: guid() — generated at the start of each run for log tracing

noInputsNote: This flow cannot be triggered from Canvas App. It is a background scheduled flow only. If manual triggering is needed (e.g. for testing), use a separate test flow that calls this flow as a child, or test directly in Power Automate by running manually.

reminderCrudNote.scope: Creating, editing, and deleting reminders is handled in the Canvas App — not in this flow.

crudOptions.optionA: Canvas App uses Patch() directly to Podsetnici list (users have Write access to Podsetnici only — exception to general Read Only rule).
crudOptions.optionB: Canvas App calls a dedicated CRUD flow (not yet in inventory — add if required by security policy).

requiredColumns.status: UNKNOWN — field type determines parse logic
UNKNOWN — may need to be created

podsetniciListRequirements.note: Confirm all internal column names and types from the Podsetnici list schema before building the flow.
